title: Leaving Home
description: The city holds shadows and secrets.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You step out into the alley behind your home.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: Are we ready?

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: We're with you every step of the way!

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You take a deep breath and carefully open the cedar box. Inside, a beautiful mechanical moth rests on velvet. Its brass wings catch the light.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Look at the inside of the lid!

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Etched into the lid is a simple compass. Three dark lights for south, east, and west. The northern light pulses brightly.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: This must track the moth. Da always thinks of everything.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You gently lift the mechanical moth. It whirs to life in your palm, wings beginning to flutter.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: (whispering) Find him. Please.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You release the moth. It spirals upward, catching the light, then darts north into the fog.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Now all we have to do is follow it.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: The moth immediately disappears into the night sky.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Oh no... I guess it's lucky we have that lid.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: Stay close. These streets are not safe, especially for a young girl and two companions.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You find yourself in front of the Watchmaker's Guild. Standing on the steps, you a see a blind old woman, begging.

opening.speaker: Crone
opening.text: Spare a penny?

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You pull a penny out of your bag and put it in the woman's hand. Her blind eyes feel like they are looking right through you.

opening.speaker: Crone
opening.text: what a lovely young woman you've turned out to be.

opening.speaker: Vera
opening.text: Do I know you?

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: the woman stares blankly and wanders away.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: why does she feel so familiar?

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Come on! the moth is in there.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: you carefully try the door. It's locked, but you recognize the lock. It looks like the kind of lock your father makes.

midpoint.speaker: Veracity
midpoint.text: I know how to open this!

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: The lock clicks. The door swings open.

mothPuzzle.title: Follow the Moth
mothPuzzle.instructions: The moth darts ahead into the fog. Follow its glow through the streets.

puzzle.title: The Spiral Lock
puzzle.instructions: Connect the gears to unlock the door.
